courses.title: Raising Confident Teenagers
courses.body:
## What You Will Learn
### Module 1: Understanding the Teenage Brain

Teenagers are not just tall children — their brains are undergoing a massive transformation that explains much of their behaviour.

### Module 2: Communication That Works

Learn how to talk with your teenager, not at them. Practical scripts for keeping communication open even through conflict.

### Module 3: Building Self-Esteem

How to nurture a strong sense of identity and self-worth, and avoid the common mistakes that quietly erode confidence.

### Module 4: Setting Boundaries With Love

Boundaries are not punishment — they are a form of care. Learn how to set firm, fair limits your teenager will actually respect.

courses.title: The Early Years: Parenting Children Ages 3–7
courses.body:
## Course Overview

### Module 1: Emotional Intelligence Starts Early

Children this age feel everything intensely but lack the words to express it. Learn how to help your child name and manage their emotions.

### Module 2: Positive Discipline
Discover discipline strategies that teach responsibility and respect while keeping your relationship with your child strong.

### Module 3: The Power of Play

Play is how young children learn. Use play intentionally to develop creativity, social skills, and problem-solving ability.

### Module 4: Preparing for School

Practical steps to make sure your child enters school feeling confident, curious, and ready to thrive.
